name: Moomoo
description_short: Commission-free US broker with 200+ charting indicators, free Level 2 data, and social features tailored for active retail traders seeking professional tools at zero cost.
description_long:
Moomoo is a commission-free trading platform operated by Moomoo Financial Inc., a subsidiary of Hong Kong-listed Futu Holdings (NASDAQ: FUTU). Launched in the US in 2018, the platform targets active retail traders seeking institutional-grade analytical tools without commissions. It covers US stocks, ETFs, options, and futures—all with $0 commissions on equities and options contracts. Regulated by FINRA and SIPC-insured, Moomoo has grown rapidly to attract millions of US account holders drawn to its combination of zero-cost trading and professional-tier data access.

The analytical toolkit is where Moomoo truly stands out in the zero-commission space. Users get 200+ technical indicators, multiple chart types, heat maps, financial statements, earnings calendars, and an AI-powered stock screener. New users receive free NASDAQ Level 2 quotes during a promotional period—a feature most brokers charge for as a premium add-on. The unusual options activity tracker and real-time options flow data give active options traders visibility typically reserved for paid services. Futures traders pay a competitive $0.65 per contract plus exchange fees.

Moomoo's built-in community layer enables traders to share trade ideas, follow experienced investors, and engage in real-time market discussions. The mobile app is consistently rated among the best in the brokerage category on both iOS and Android, while a full desktop client ensures a seamless multi-device experience. A cash sweep program earns a competitive APY on uninvested funds, and new account promotions routinely include free stock rewards tied to deposit size.

The platform's main limitations are a narrower product lineup compared to full-service brokers—no mutual funds, fixed income, or robo-advisory options—and customer support that can be slow during high-volume periods. International stock access (Hong Kong-listed securities) requires meeting eligibility criteria. For active equity and options traders who prioritize sophisticated free tools and zero commissions, Moomoo ranks among the strongest offerings in the US retail brokerage market.
affiliate_commission: Free stock rewards per qualified referral

tiers.name: Free
features: $0 commission on US stocks and ETFs
$0.65 per futures contract plus exchange fees
Level 2 quotes (promotional period for new users)

pros: $0 commissions on stocks, ETFs, and options contracts
200+ technical indicators available on the free plan
Free NASDAQ Level 2 quotes for new accounts during promotional period
Highly rated mobile app with full-featured desktop client
Unusual options activity tracker and real-time options flow data
cons: No mutual funds, bonds, or robo-advisory services
Level 2 data requires paid subscription after promotional period ends
Customer support can be slow during high-volume market periods
No custom indicator scripting or automated trading support
